tools.name: projects.essentialcontactsProjectsContactsCompute
tools.description: Lists all contacts for the resource that are subscribed to the specified notification categories, including contacts inherited from any parent resources.

tools.name: projects.essentialcontactsProjectsContactsCreate
tools.description: Adds a new contact for a resource.

tools.name: projects.essentialcontactsProjectsContactsList
tools.description: Lists the contacts that have been set on a resource.

tools.name: projects.essentialcontactsProjectsContactsPatch
tools.description: Updates a contact. Note: A contact's email address cannot be changed.

tools.name: projects.essentialcontactsProjectsContactsSendTestMessage
tools.description: Allows a contact admin to send a test message to contact to verify that it has been configured correctly.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
